title: [SBW] Vintage Vehicle Pack
description: This mod is mainly for the Superb Warfare mod, which adds military equipment.
body:
**Coremod "[Superb Warfare](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare)" is required in order for this pack to work!**

**Vintage Vehicle Pack is an add-on for the Superb Warfare mod that adds military vehicles. The add-on is under constant development and updates are released regularly.**

**In future updates, we plan to add:**

- The T72 series
- The T90 series
- The BMP series
- The BMD series
- Other military vehicles

**If you find any bugs, please contact the official [Discord server](https://discord.gg/25XqCnUb4X) for the add-on.**

Only code is open-sourced, **not assets**.

_**Re-posting to other sites is prohibited**_
